stream.$comment: Optional props if source is set to 'stream'.

gfn.$comment: Required props if source is set to 'gfn'.

local.$comment: Required props if source is set to 'local'. server 仅作【构建期默认/dev 回退】；生产/跨机真实 Kit IP 由 docker/.env 的 KIT_HOST_IP 运行期注入，勿在此写死。端口对齐 .kit 的 streamPort=12333(media)/signalPort=12334。
